message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "teacher" as teacher
participant "操作界面" as UI
participant "studentcourse" as SC
participant "student" as S
participant "experiment" as E
participant "experimentscore" as ES
participant "scoreitem" as SI

activate teacher
activate UI

teacher -> UI: 1 选择学期
UI -> SC: 2 查询哪些学生选了老师的课
activate SC
SC -> S: 3 请求学生列表
activate S
S --> SC: 4 返回数据
deactivate S
deactivate SC

UI -> E: 5 查询这些课程的实验
activate E
E -> ES: 6 查询实验得分
activate ES
ES -> SI: 7 查询得分
activate SI
SI --> ES: 8 返回
deactivate SI
ES --> E: 9 返回得分
deactivate ES
E --> UI: 10 返回得分列表
deactivate E
UI --> teacher: 11 显示数据
deactivate UI
deactivate teacher

@enduml
```
